task: Show me the most helpful reviews of the PlayStation 5 Digital Edition on Micro Center.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct Micro Center product page for the PlayStation 5 Digital Edition - Slim and opened the Reviews section. The trajectory shows the review sort control was changed to 'Most Helpful' (snapshot shows combobox 'Menu, Sort by Most Helpful.' and the reordered review list). The final response lists the reviews visible on screen after that sort, with titles/snippets/helpfulness counts supported by the page snapshot. Although the ordering appears somewhat unintuitive relative to raw helpful vote counts, the site explicitly showed the reviews in that order under 'Most Helpful', so the task is satisfied.
final_result_response:
I found the Micro Center page for the **Sony PlayStation 5 Digital Edition - Slim**. <citation refs="fetch_call_vc9YHSiw5ZX3LWQ3NAv7Yxjh|fc_0ee60403fbb2f23c016a04456676e08198bb4e606185363dca#1">Sony PlayStation 5 Digital Edition - Slim; 1 TB SSD; 16 GB GDDR6 RAM; Dual-Sense Wireless Controller - Micro Center</citation>

Sorted by Micro Center’s **Most Helpful** review sort, the written reviews shown are:

1. **Taren**, 5 stars, verified purchaser  
   **“Love it fr fr”**  
   “Greatest thing I've bought in the last year great way to spend my time in the wonter”  
   Helpful: **2 yes, 0 no**

2. **JustNATE**, 5 stars, verified purchaser  
   **“playstation 5 digital edition”**  
   “playstation 5 digital edition for gt7. good system. Yes, I recommend this product.”  
   Helpful: **1 yes, 0 no**

3. **RONEY TIMOTEO**, 5 stars, verified purchaser  
   **“Great device for games”**  
   “Great game console that provide high performance and great quality. Yes, I recommend this product.”  
   Helpful: **1 yes, 0 no**

4. **David in China**, 5 stars, verified purchaser  
   **“New to the PS5. Nice system.”**  
   “I’ve only used the game a few times, since I’m not the primary user. But I’ve got to admit that the PS5 is a work of art in terms of gameplay, ease of usage, and the ability to upgrade or download games. Yes, I recommend this product.”  
   Helpful: **10 yes, 1 no**

5. **Twentyforekarat**, 5 stars, verified purchaser  
   **“Maximize your Digi PS5 purchase.”**  
   “The digital console when paired with yearly PS 4-5 gaming subscription works well. Also, FYI EA sports games are not included they have their own subscription service.”  
   Helpful: **1 yes, 1 no**

Note: the page shows **20 total reviews**, but **15 are ratings-only**, so these are the text reviews Micro Center displays.
action_history: Opening Micro Center: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.microcenter.com/');
Searching product: await page.locator('e6').fill('PlayStation 5 Digital Edition');
Filtering to PlayStation systems: await page.locator('e89').click();
Checking review sort options: await page.locator('e183').click();
Sorting reviews by most helpful: await page.locator('e375').click();
